name: Sigfrid Karg-Elert
abstract: Sigfrid Theodor Karg-Elert (né Karg; 21 November 1877 – 9 April 1933) was a German composer and organist who wrote prolifically for pipe and reed organs.

works_created.t: Vom Himmel hoch da komm' ich her, Op. 82, No. 2
Sonata for Flute and Piano in B-flat Major, Op. 121
Suite pointillistique, Op. 135: 1. Leicht bewegt (Im stile einer Arabeske)
Sonata appassionata in F-sharp Minor, Op. 140
Solo Clarinet Sonata in C-sharp Minor, Op. 140
